_comment: LOCAL-RUN allowlist for the expect-matcher gate (scripts/check-matchers.mjs).
SOURCE OF TRUTH is the runner shim's SUPPORTED_MATCHERS array
(synthwatch@main runner/specfetch/specShim.ts) — CI fetches that file and parses it
live (SHIM_SOURCE). This committed snapshot is the intended source ONLY for LOCAL runs
(npm run check, which does not fetch the shim), with a loud warning; it is restrictive
(never allow-all) and may lag the shim. In CI a fetch OR parse failure now HARD-FAILS
the job (it does NOT silently fall back here) so a moved/renamed shim surfaces loudly.
Snapshot of the shim's implemented set as of 2026-07-04 (11 matchers, runner recon).
Keep in sync opportunistically when the shim adds a matcher.
